<!--
PR template. Sections are a checklist for the author (human or AI): fill each,
or write "n/a" with a reason. "Evidence" is not optional — a PR without proof it
was validated is not ready for review.
-->

## Goal

<!-- What problem does this PR solve? Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Scope

<!-- Which files/areas changed, and why those boundaries are correct. -->

## Risk & rollback

<!-- Behavioral / operational / security risk. State "low" with a reason if it
     truly is. How to revert or mitigate quickly if this regresses. -->

## Evidence

<!-- Required. How you know this works: CI run, local `pre-commit run
     --all-files` output, test results, manual validation notes. -->
